## Summary
- What changed and why?

## Validation
- [ ] `cd src && python -m pipelines.run_quality_gate --profile canonical`
- [ ] (if relevant) `cd src && python -m pipelines.run_quality_gate --profile legacy`
- [ ] (if relevant) `cd src && python -m pipelines.validate_canonical_artifacts`

## Reproducibility impact
- Does this modify benchmark semantics, metrics, scenario coverage, estimator registry, or plotting contracts?

## Notes
- Link related issues and include any migration notes.
